wrangle-attest demo run
signing is real: --sign signs against public-good Sigstore, which writes a
public Rekor transparency-log entry under the signing identity.
signatures, Fulcio certs and Rekor entries are never printed: they differ
every run. Everything below is deterministic.

=== the input a user starts from
# two release binaries and one container image digest:

$ sha256sum dist/wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64 dist/wrangle_0.1.0_darwin_arm64
    47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66  dist/wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64
    c059e5962b766a11cc39854f0bacc2fac133b5c25e95b4a2380fa9abbb649cee  dist/wrangle_0.1.0_darwin_arm64
    [exit 0]

# subjects.txt - one subject per line, file paths are self-digested:

$ cat subjects.txt
    dist/wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64
    dist/wrangle_0.1.0_darwin_arm64
    sha256:1923631e35baf2fd56a54ceabea80af979e9ca59b597aa29f5fe679fe8ce8256
    [exit 0]

# each tool leaves its own metadata root: a manifest plus its native result
# file. A real scan run produces one scan/v1 manifest per scanner.

$ ls meta
    osv-scanner
    sbom
    wrangle-lint
    zizmor
    [exit 0]

$ cat meta/sbom/wrangle_attestation_metadata.json
    {
      "predicate-type": "https://spdx.dev/Document",
      "result-file": "sbom.spdx.json"
    }
    [exit 0]

$ cat meta/osv-scanner/wrangle_attestation_metadata.json
    {
      "predicate-type": "https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1",
      "result-file": "output.sarif",
      "tool": {
        "name": "osv-scanner",
        "version": "2.2.4"
      },
      "result": "findings"
    }
    [exit 0]

$ cat meta/zizmor/wrangle_attestation_metadata.json
    {
      "predicate-type": "https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1",
      "result-file": "output.sarif",
      "tool": {
        "name": "zizmor",
        "version": "1.16.0"
      },
      "result": "findings"
    }
    [exit 0]

$ cat meta/wrangle-lint/wrangle_attestation_metadata.json
    {
      "predicate-type": "https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1",
      "result-file": "output.sarif",
      "tool": {
        "name": "wrangle-lint",
        "version": "0.4.0"
      },
      "result": "clean"
    }
    [exit 0]

=== fail closed: a non-sha256 subject digest
# the GitHub attestation store keys by sha256; a sha512 subject is refused,
# not silently reinterpreted as a file path.

$ wrangle-attest assemble \
    --metadata-root meta/sbom \
    --metadata-root meta/osv-scanner \
    --metadata-root meta/zizmor \
    --metadata-root meta/wrangle-lint \
    --subjects-file bad-subjects.txt \
    --provenance provenance/provenance.fixture.intoto.jsonl \
    --sign \
    --bundle-dir bundles \
    --statements-out statements.jsonl
    wrangle-attest: subject "sha512:eeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee" must be sha256:<64-hex>
    wrangle-attest: failing closed.
    [exit 2]
check: sha512 subject exits 2: 2

=== fail closed: two subjects that collide on one bundle name
# bundle names are basenames, so a rebuilt artifact under another directory
# would clobber the first bundle. Refused before anything is signed.

$ cat colliding-subjects.txt
    dist/wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64
    dist-rebuild/wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64
    [exit 0]

$ wrangle-attest assemble \
    --metadata-root meta/sbom \
    --subjects-file colliding-subjects.txt \
    --provenance provenance/provenance.fixture.intoto.jsonl \
    --sign \
    --bundle-dir bundles \
    --statements-out statements.jsonl
    wrangle-attest: duplicate bundle basename wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64.intoto.jsonl — refusing to clobber
    wrangle-attest: failing closed.
    [exit 2]
check: duplicate bundle name exits 2: 2

=== fail closed: a manifest naming an unknown predicate type

$ cat meta-broken/wrangle_attestation_metadata.json
    {
      "predicate-type": "https://example.com/not-a-known-predicate/v1",
      "result-file": "output.sarif"
    }
    [exit 0]

$ wrangle-attest assemble \
    --metadata-root meta-broken \
    --subjects-file subjects.txt \
    --provenance provenance/provenance.fixture.intoto.jsonl \
    --sign \
    --bundle-dir bundles \
    --statements-out statements.jsonl
    wrangle-attest: meta-broken/wrangle_attestation_metadata.json: unknown predicate-type "https://example.com/not-a-known-predicate/v1"
    wrangle-attest: failing closed.
    [exit 2]
check: unknown predicate-type exits 2: 2

=== fail closed: no provenance
# every bundle starts from the build's provenance, so assemble refuses to
# run without exactly one of --provenance / --provenance-referrers.

$ wrangle-attest assemble \
    --metadata-root meta/sbom \
    --subjects-file subjects.txt \
    --sign \
    --bundle-dir bundles \
    --statements-out statements.jsonl
    wrangle-attest: exactly one of --provenance or --provenance-referrers is required
    wrangle-attest: failing closed.
    [exit 2]
check: missing provenance exits 2: 2
check: no bundle directory was created: absent

=== sign the build's SLSA provenance
# the provenance is normally handed over by the build; here the demo signs
# the statement itself, so assemble gets a real Sigstore bundle line.

$ wrangle-attest \
    --sign \
    --statement provenance/provenance.statement.json \
    --out provenance/provenance.intoto.jsonl
    wrangle-attest: wrote signed statement to provenance/provenance.intoto.jsonl
    [exit 0]
check: provenance bundle lines: 1

=== assemble: sign every tool's metadata, one bundle per artifact

$ wrangle-attest assemble \
    --metadata-root meta/sbom \
    --metadata-root meta/osv-scanner \
    --metadata-root meta/zizmor \
    --metadata-root meta/wrangle-lint \
    --subjects-file subjects.txt \
    --provenance provenance/provenance.intoto.jsonl \
    --commit 0f4f2b3d3b7a1c8e5d9a6b4c2e1f0a9b8c7d6e5f \
    --sign \
    --bundle-dir bundles \
    --statements-out statements.jsonl
    wrangle-attest: wrote 3 bundle(s) to bundles/ and 12 signed statement(s) to statements.jsonl
    [exit 0]

=== what came out

$ ls bundles
    sha256-1923631e35baf2fd56a54ceabea80af979e9ca59b597aa29f5fe679fe8ce8256.intoto.jsonl
    wrangle_0.1.0_darwin_arm64.intoto.jsonl
    wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64.intoto.jsonl
    [exit 0]
check: bundles written: 3
check: newly signed statements: 12
# every bundle: the shared provenance verbatim, then that artifact's own
# signed statements - one scan/v1 per scanner, plus the SBOM. Decoded from
# the DSSE payload of each line.

  wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64.intoto.jsonl  (5 statement(s))
    1. predicateType: https://slsa.dev/provenance/v1
       subject:       sha256:47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66
       subject:       sha256:c059e5962b766a11cc39854f0bacc2fac133b5c25e95b4a2380fa9abbb649cee
       subject:       sha256:1923631e35baf2fd56a54ceabea80af979e9ca59b597aa29f5fe679fe8ce8256
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    2. predicateType: https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1
       tool:          osv-scanner 2.2.4  (result: findings)
       subject:       sha256:47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    3. predicateType: https://spdx.dev/Document
       subject:       sha256:47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    4. predicateType: https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1
       tool:          wrangle-lint 0.4.0  (result: clean)
       subject:       sha256:47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    5. predicateType: https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1
       tool:          zizmor 1.16.0  (result: findings)
       subject:       sha256:47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry

  wrangle_0.1.0_darwin_arm64.intoto.jsonl  (5 statement(s))
    1. predicateType: https://slsa.dev/provenance/v1
       subject:       sha256:47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66
       subject:       sha256:c059e5962b766a11cc39854f0bacc2fac133b5c25e95b4a2380fa9abbb649cee
       subject:       sha256:1923631e35baf2fd56a54ceabea80af979e9ca59b597aa29f5fe679fe8ce8256
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    2. predicateType: https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1
       tool:          osv-scanner 2.2.4  (result: findings)
       subject:       sha256:c059e5962b766a11cc39854f0bacc2fac133b5c25e95b4a2380fa9abbb649cee
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    3. predicateType: https://spdx.dev/Document
       subject:       sha256:c059e5962b766a11cc39854f0bacc2fac133b5c25e95b4a2380fa9abbb649cee
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    4. predicateType: https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1
       tool:          wrangle-lint 0.4.0  (result: clean)
       subject:       sha256:c059e5962b766a11cc39854f0bacc2fac133b5c25e95b4a2380fa9abbb649cee
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    5. predicateType: https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1
       tool:          zizmor 1.16.0  (result: findings)
       subject:       sha256:c059e5962b766a11cc39854f0bacc2fac133b5c25e95b4a2380fa9abbb649cee
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry

  sha256-1923631e35baf2fd56a54ceabea80af979e9ca59b597aa29f5fe679fe8ce8256.intoto.jsonl  (5 statement(s))
    1. predicateType: https://slsa.dev/provenance/v1
       subject:       sha256:47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66
       subject:       sha256:c059e5962b766a11cc39854f0bacc2fac133b5c25e95b4a2380fa9abbb649cee
       subject:       sha256:1923631e35baf2fd56a54ceabea80af979e9ca59b597aa29f5fe679fe8ce8256
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    2. predicateType: https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1
       tool:          osv-scanner 2.2.4  (result: findings)
       subject:       sha256:1923631e35baf2fd56a54ceabea80af979e9ca59b597aa29f5fe679fe8ce8256
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    3. predicateType: https://spdx.dev/Document
       subject:       sha256:1923631e35baf2fd56a54ceabea80af979e9ca59b597aa29f5fe679fe8ce8256
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    4. predicateType: https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1
       tool:          wrangle-lint 0.4.0  (result: clean)
       subject:       sha256:1923631e35baf2fd56a54ceabea80af979e9ca59b597aa29f5fe679fe8ce8256
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    5. predicateType: https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1
       tool:          zizmor 1.16.0  (result: findings)
       subject:       sha256:1923631e35baf2fd56a54ceabea80af979e9ca59b597aa29f5fe679fe8ce8256
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
check: statements per bundle: 5

=== sign the VSA and append it to the artifact's bundle
# what actions/verify does after the policy passes: one process signs the
# VSA and appends the identical signed line to that artifact's bundle.

$ wrangle-attest \
    --sign \
    --statement vsa/vsa.statement.json \
    --out vsa/vsa.intoto.jsonl \
    --append bundles/wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64.intoto.jsonl
    wrangle-attest: wrote signed statement to vsa/vsa.intoto.jsonl
    wrangle-attest: appended signed statement to bundles/wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64.intoto.jsonl
    [exit 0]

  wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64.intoto.jsonl  (6 statement(s))
    1. predicateType: https://slsa.dev/provenance/v1
       subject:       sha256:47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66
       subject:       sha256:c059e5962b766a11cc39854f0bacc2fac133b5c25e95b4a2380fa9abbb649cee
       subject:       sha256:1923631e35baf2fd56a54ceabea80af979e9ca59b597aa29f5fe679fe8ce8256
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    2. predicateType: https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1
       tool:          osv-scanner 2.2.4  (result: findings)
       subject:       sha256:47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    3. predicateType: https://spdx.dev/Document
       subject:       sha256:47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    4. predicateType: https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1
       tool:          wrangle-lint 0.4.0  (result: clean)
       subject:       sha256:47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    5. predicateType: https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1
       tool:          zizmor 1.16.0  (result: findings)
       subject:       sha256:47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
    6. predicateType: https://slsa.dev/verification_summary/v1
       subject:       sha256:47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66
       material:      fulcio-cert + rekor-entry
check: linux bundle after append: 6
check: darwin bundle untouched: 5

=== what wrangle actually attests: the statements in full
# the complete in-toto statement decoded from each line of the linux
# bundle, exactly as signed. The other two bundles carry the same
# statements bound to their own digest, and the provenance line is
# byte-identical in all three, so they are not repeated here.

--- wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64.intoto.jsonl, statement 1 ---
{
  "_type": "https://in-toto.io/Statement/v1",
  "predicateType": "https://slsa.dev/provenance/v1",
  "subject": [
    {
      "name": "wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64",
      "digest": {
        "sha256": "47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66"
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "wrangle_0.1.0_darwin_arm64",
      "digest": {
        "sha256": "c059e5962b766a11cc39854f0bacc2fac133b5c25e95b4a2380fa9abbb649cee"
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "wrangle-demo-image",
      "digest": {
        "sha256": "1923631e35baf2fd56a54ceabea80af979e9ca59b597aa29f5fe679fe8ce8256"
      }
    }
  ],
  "predicate": {
    "buildDefinition": {
      "buildType": "https://slsa-framework.github.io/github-actions-buildtypes/workflow/v1",
      "externalParameters": {
        "workflow": {
          "ref": "refs/tags/v0.1.0",
          "repository": "https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle-demo",
          "path": ".github/workflows/release.yml"
        }
      }
    },
    "runDetails": {
      "builder": {
        "id": "https://github.com/actions/runner/github-hosted"
      }
    }
  }
}

--- wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64.intoto.jsonl, statement 2 ---
{
  "_type": "https://in-toto.io/Statement/v1",
  "predicate": {
    "result": "findings",
    "sarif": {
      "$schema": "https://json.schemastore.org/sarif-2.1.0.json",
      "runs": [
        {
          "results": [
            {
              "level": "error",
              "locations": [
                {
                  "physicalLocation": {
                    "artifactLocation": {
                      "uri": "go.mod"
                    }
                  }
                }
              ],
              "message": {
                "text": "golang.org/x/net@0.23.0 is affected by GHSA-xxxx-yyyy-zzzz (fixed in 0.38.0)"
              },
              "ruleId": "GHSA-xxxx-yyyy-zzzz"
            }
          ],
          "tool": {
            "driver": {
              "informationUri": "https://github.com/google/osv-scanner",
              "name": "osv-scanner",
              "version": "2.2.4"
            }
          }
        }
      ],
      "version": "2.1.0"
    },
    "scannedCommit": "0f4f2b3d3b7a1c8e5d9a6b4c2e1f0a9b8c7d6e5f",
    "tool": {
      "name": "osv-scanner",
      "version": "2.2.4"
    }
  },
  "predicateType": "https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1",
  "subject": [
    {
      "digest": {
        "sha256": "47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66"
      }
    }
  ]
}

--- wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64.intoto.jsonl, statement 3 ---
{
  "_type": "https://in-toto.io/Statement/v1",
  "predicate": {
    "SPDXID": "SPDXRef-DOCUMENT",
    "name": "wrangle-demo-0.1.0",
    "packages": [
      {
        "SPDXID": "SPDXRef-Package-wrangle",
        "licenseDeclared": "Apache-2.0",
        "name": "wrangle",
        "versionInfo": "0.1.0"
      }
    ],
    "spdxVersion": "SPDX-2.3"
  },
  "predicateType": "https://spdx.dev/Document",
  "subject": [
    {
      "digest": {
        "sha256": "47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66"
      }
    }
  ]
}

--- wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64.intoto.jsonl, statement 4 ---
{
  "_type": "https://in-toto.io/Statement/v1",
  "predicate": {
    "result": "clean",
    "sarif": {
      "$schema": "https://json.schemastore.org/sarif-2.1.0.json",
      "runs": [
        {
          "results": [],
          "tool": {
            "driver": {
              "informationUri": "https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle",
              "name": "wrangle-lint",
              "version": "0.4.0"
            }
          }
        }
      ],
      "version": "2.1.0"
    },
    "scannedCommit": "0f4f2b3d3b7a1c8e5d9a6b4c2e1f0a9b8c7d6e5f",
    "tool": {
      "name": "wrangle-lint",
      "version": "0.4.0"
    }
  },
  "predicateType": "https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1",
  "subject": [
    {
      "digest": {
        "sha256": "47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66"
      }
    }
  ]
}

--- wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64.intoto.jsonl, statement 5 ---
{
  "_type": "https://in-toto.io/Statement/v1",
  "predicate": {
    "result": "findings",
    "sarif": {
      "$schema": "https://json.schemastore.org/sarif-2.1.0.json",
      "runs": [
        {
          "results": [
            {
              "level": "warning",
              "locations": [
                {
                  "physicalLocation": {
                    "artifactLocation": {
                      "uri": ".github/workflows/release.yml"
                    },
                    "region": {
                      "startLine": 12
                    }
                  }
                }
              ],
              "message": {
                "text": "credential persistence through GitHub Actions artifacts"
              },
              "ruleId": "artipacked"
            }
          ],
          "tool": {
            "driver": {
              "informationUri": "https://github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor",
              "name": "zizmor",
              "version": "1.16.0"
            }
          }
        }
      ],
      "version": "2.1.0"
    },
    "scannedCommit": "0f4f2b3d3b7a1c8e5d9a6b4c2e1f0a9b8c7d6e5f",
    "tool": {
      "name": "zizmor",
      "version": "1.16.0"
    }
  },
  "predicateType": "https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/attestation/scan/v1",
  "subject": [
    {
      "digest": {
        "sha256": "47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66"
      }
    }
  ]
}

--- wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64.intoto.jsonl, statement 6 ---
{
  "_type": "https://in-toto.io/Statement/v1",
  "predicateType": "https://slsa.dev/verification_summary/v1",
  "subject": [
    {
      "name": "wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64",
      "digest": {
        "sha256": "47d801ffad72f6bdb405dec1ead7c45a9d66697f4984d8f502d632c68bb63e66"
      }
    }
  ],
  "predicate": {
    "verifier": {
      "id": "https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle"
    },
    "timeVerified": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "resourceUri": "pkg:github/TomHennen/wrangle-demo@v0.1.0",
    "policy": {
      "uri": "https://github.com/TomHennen/wrangle/policies/release.hjson"
    },
    "verificationResult": "PASSED",
    "verifiedLevels": [
      "SLSA_BUILD_LEVEL_3"
    ]
  }
}

=== fail closed: append to a bundle that does not exist

$ wrangle-attest \
    --sign \
    --statement vsa/vsa.statement.json \
    --out vsa/vsa2.intoto.jsonl \
    --append bundles/does_not_exist.intoto.jsonl
    wrangle-attest: append target: stat bundles/does_not_exist.intoto.jsonl: no such file or directory
    wrangle-attest: failing closed.
    [exit 2]
check: append to missing bundle exits 2: 2
check: no stray --out written: absent

=== fail closed: a --statement that is not an in-toto statement
# the payload is signed verbatim, so the engine checks it really is a
# statement before it signs arbitrary JSON.

$ cat vsa/not-a-statement.json
    {
      "hello": "this is not an in-toto statement"
    }
    [exit 0]

$ wrangle-attest \
    --sign \
    --statement vsa/not-a-statement.json \
    --out vsa/bogus.intoto.jsonl
    wrangle-attest: signing statement: verifying content: unable to unmarshal intoto statement from payload
    wrangle-attest: failing closed.
    [exit 2]
check: non-statement JSON exits 2: 2
check: no bogus bundle written: absent

=== re-running assemble refuses to clobber

$ wrangle-attest assemble \
    --metadata-root meta/sbom \
    --metadata-root meta/osv-scanner \
    --metadata-root meta/zizmor \
    --metadata-root meta/wrangle-lint \
    --subjects-file subjects.txt \
    --provenance provenance/provenance.intoto.jsonl \
    --sign \
    --bundle-dir bundles \
    --statements-out statements.jsonl
    wrangle-attest: bundle wrangle_0.1.0_linux_amd64.intoto.jsonl already exists under bundles — refusing to clobber
    wrangle-attest: failing closed.
    [exit 2]
check: re-run over a populated bundle-dir exits 2: 2
check: linux bundle still intact: 6

=== result
all checks passed
